rationale: No conflict. Gov't Code §2161.181 governs state agency HUB procurement goals; it is unrelated to property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A state agency, including the comptroller, shall make a good faith effort to increase the contract awards for the purchase of goods or services
_note: Rule text concerns HUB procurement; proposed change concerns homestead exemption. No overlap.
